Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-uncleared-registers
Description: aes_128.key may be exposed through observable outputs or debug/register remnants accessible on aes_128.out; check that sensitive key material is not output or left in observable registers.

Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-uncleared-registers
Description: aes_128.state may be leaked via debug outputs or uncleared registers observable on aes_128.out; verify state is not emitted or retained in observable registers.

Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-uncleared-registers
Description: aes_128.a1.in (sensitive input) may be exposed through debug outputs or uncleared registers observable at aes_128.out; ensure inputs are not leaked via observable outputs or retained in debug-accessible registers.

Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-uncleared-registers
Description: aes_128.a1.out_1 may be observable via debug outputs or uncleared registers accessible on aes_128.out; check that intermediate outputs are not exposed through observable outputs or debug-accessible registers.

Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-uncleared-registers
Description: aes_128.a1.out_2 may be leaked through debug outputs or uncleared registers visible at aes_128.out; ensure intermediate outputs are not emitted or retained in observable registers.

Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-observable-discrepancy
Description: aes_128.r1.key may be exposed through debug-accessible outputs, uncleared registers, or observable behavioral differences visible on aes_128.out; verify keys are not observable or retained in outputs/registers.

Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-observable-discrepancy
Description: aes_128.r1.state_in may be leaked via debug outputs, uncleared registers, or observable discrepancies visible on aes_128.out; ensure internal state is not emitted or retained in observable/debug-accessible registers.

Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-observable-discrepancy
Description: aes_128.r1.state_out may be observable via debug outputs, uncleared registers, or observable behavioral differences on aes_128.out; confirm outputs/state are not exposed through observable ports or retained in registers.

Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-observable-discrepancy
Description: aes_128.rf.key_in may be leaked via debug outputs, uncleared registers, or observable differences visible on aes_128.out; ensure key inputs are not emitted or retained in observable/debug-accessible registers.

Name: Confidentiality-Leak-via-debug-or-observable-discrepancy
Description: aes_128.rf.state_in may be exposed through debug-accessible outputs, uncleared registers, or observable behavioral differences on aes_128.out; verify internal state is not exposed or retained in observable registers.

Name: Leak_internal_state_out_observable_rf_state_out
Description: Sensitive AES round/register state (aes_128.rf.state_out) may be exposed through the observable output (aes_128.out), enabling disclosure of secret internal state. Test/debug/zeroization or side-channel issues can make this state recoverable from the output.

Name: Leak_internal_state_out_observable_r1_t0_state
Description: The intermediate AES state (aes_128.r1.t0.state) may remain observable or leak through the device output (aes_128.out) due to improper zeroization, side-channels, or observable behavioral differences. This enables disclosure of internal state.

Name: Faults_or_SEU_affect_p0_and_observable_on_output
Description: Faults, glitches, defects, or SEUs affecting aes_128.r1.t0.p0 can lead to incorrect or unavailable functionality that becomes observable on aes_128.out, indicating a potential denial-of-service or malfunction.

Name: Faults_or_SEU_affect_p1_and_observable_on_output
Description: Faults, glitches, defects, or SEUs affecting aes_128.r1.t0.p1 can cause incorrect behavior or denial of service that is observable on aes_128.out.

Name: Faults_or_SEU_affect_p2_and_observable_on_output
Description: Faults, glitches, defects, or SEUs affecting aes_128.r1.t0.p2 can lead to observable incorrect outputs on aes_128.out, indicating potential denial-of-service or malfunction.

Name: Faults_or_SEU_affect_p3_and_observable_on_output
Description: Faults, glitches, defects, or SEUs affecting aes_128.r1.t0.p3 can manifest as incorrect or unavailable behavior observable on aes_128.out, indicating potential service disruption.
